SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource

Record Class FileScanConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.FileScanConfig
Record Components:
projection - column indices to read (empty list means all columns)
limit - maximum number of rows to return, or null for no limit
batchSize - the batch size for reading, or null for the DataFusion default
partitionedByFileGroup - whether the scan is partitioned by file group
partition - the partition index being scanned
public record FileScanConfig(List<Integer> projection, Long limit, Long batchSize, boolean partitionedByFileGroup, int partition) extends Record
Scan configuration passed from DataFusion to FileSource.createFileOpener(org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema, org.apache.arrow.memory.BufferAllocator, org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.FileScanConfig) containing query-specific parameters extracted from the upstream FileScanConfig Rust struct.

Example: 

// FileScanConfig is provided by DataFusion to FileSource.createFileOpener
FileOpener opener = source.createFileOpener(
    schema, allocator, scanConfig);
List<Integer> projection = scanConfig.projection();
Long limit = scanConfig.limit();
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: FileScanConfig

  • Constructor Details

    • FileScanConfig

      public FileScanConfig(List<Integer> projection, Long limit, Long batchSize, boolean partitionedByFileGroup, int partition)
      Creates an instance of a FileScanConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      projection - the value for the projection record component
      limit - the value for the limit record component
      batchSize - the value for the batchSize record component
      partitionedByFileGroup - the value for the partitionedByFileGroup record component
      partition - the value for the partition record component

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the projection record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the projection record component

      Returns the value of the partition record component.
      Returns:
